missing.source: A matching allow rule returns an allowed AccessDecision when any condition passes.
A missing rule denies access explicitly and never allows by fallback.
A missing rule returns a denied AccessDecision with an explicit reason.
ACL conditions must not read globals silently.
ACL failures use stable code prefixes.
Access denial must be explicit and inspectable.
Access is never allowed implicitly after an ACL exception.
